root.rep_text: -> รายงานเคลื่อนไหวหุ้น
root.sql: select sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no ) as memname ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.return_interest ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.return_principal ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_return ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_description ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.member_group_no ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.member_group_name , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') as receipt_date -- ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.* from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP where 1=1 and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no = SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.membership_no and SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.member_group_no = SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.member_group_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code like 'ML%' -- and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = 2025 -- and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = 6 /*WHERE*/ order by sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_date asc ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no
